testcase.name: Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-004: Enter full long name on Create — form submits without error

failure.message: Insurance form modal should be open — "Enter name" field must be visible

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › insurance-name-truncation.spec.ts:218:7 › Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-008: Open Edit form for existing record — Edit form opens successfully
Error: Insurance form modal should be open — "Enter name" field must be visible
expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('input[placeholder="Enter name"], input[placeholder="Name"], [role="dialog"] input[type="text"]:not([placeholder*="Search" i]), .modal-backdrop input[placeholder*="name" i]:not([placeholder*="Search" i])').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Insurance form modal should be open — "Enter name" field must be visible with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('input[placeholder="Enter name"], input[placeholder="Name"], [role="dialog"] input[type="text"]:not([placeholder*="Search" i]), .modal-backdrop input[placeholder*="name" i]:not([placeholder*="Search" i])').first()
at ..\page-objects\InsuranceFormPage.ts:193
191 | this.nameInput, 192 | 'Insurance form modal should be open — "Enter name" field must be visible', > 193 | ).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5_000 }); | ^ 194 | } 195 | 196 | /** at InsuranceFormPage.verifyFormIsOpen (C:\Users\Krimit\Desktop\AI-QA-POC\BUG-Retest-Insurance-Name-Truncation\page-objects\InsuranceFormPage.ts:193:7) at C:\Users\Krimit\Desktop\AI-QA-POC\BUG-Retest-Insurance-Name-Truncation\scripts\insurance-name-truncation.spec.ts:223:5
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\output\artifacts\insurance-name-truncation--30731-dit-form-opens-successfully-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-009: Verify pre-populated name is full — Edit form shows the untruncated value
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-010: Update name to long value and save — full updated name is persisted
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-011: Verify updated name after edit — listing shows the updated full name
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-012: Updated full name visible in listing after edit
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-013: No truncation after edit — updated full name is not clipped in UI
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-014: Name at previous truncation threshold (50 chars) saves in full
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-015: Name just above old threshold (51 chars) saves in full — fix confirmed
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-016: Short name saves correctly — no regression for short values
Insurance Name Truncation — Bug Retest @insurance › TC-017: Name with special characters saves without truncation or alteration
